# CoPilot Instructions

The purpose of this repository is described in the [README](README.md). 

The overall design of the solution is described in the [DESIGN.md](DESIGN.md) file.

## Dialoge instructions

- When responding to questions about the project, always refer to the README and DESIGN documents for context.
- When responding with tasks for the developer, only respond with one task at a time, and wait for the developer to confirm completion before suggesting the next task.
